name: inclusive-design-skills
description: Inclusive Design Skills: agentic skills for accessible, inclusive products — from cognitive accessibility to adaptive interfaces, inclusive research, and accessibility decisions.

plugins.name: cognitive-accessibility
plugins.description: Design for how people actually think: cognitive load, plain language, wayfinding, focus, memory, and error recovery.

plugins.name: inclusive-interaction
plugins.description: Design multi-modal interactions that adapt to how people move, perceive, and communicate.

plugins.name: accessible-content
plugins.description: Structure content that works for screen readers, cognitive differences, and diverse literacy levels.

plugins.name: inclusive-personas
plugins.description: Build user stories, personas, and scenarios that include disability from the start.

plugins.name: adaptive-interfaces
plugins.description: Design systems that respect user preferences and adapt to individual needs.

plugins.name: accessibility-decisions
plugins.description: Document, communicate, and maintain accessibility decisions across teams and time.
